title: Typed Tool Contracts, JSON Schema, Descriptions, Domains, and Versions · Language Clinic: Tool Domain Types
summary: A broad execute tool accepts free-form strings, hides side effects, uses ambiguous parameter names, has no bounds or schema version, and exposes more authority than the task needs. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the tool domain types increment in least-capability typed tool catalog. Learners progress through prediction, explicit th…
objectives: Replace ambiguous strings with domain types, enums, identifiers, units, timestamps, and validated references without leaking secrets.
Write tool and parameter descriptions that distinguish when to call, when not to call, required evidence, effects, and failure semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-tool-domain-types — Replace ambiguous strings with domain types, enums, identifiers, units, timestamps, and validated references without leaking secrets.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-schema-design-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-schema-design-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_tool_schema_design_3(tool_schemas: int = 8, valid_schemas: int = 8, ambiguous_parameters: int = 0, bounded_enums: int = 6, schema_versions: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if tool_schemas < 3 or valid_schemas < 0:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-count"
    if valid_schemas != tool_schemas:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-invalid"
    if ambiguous_parameters > 0 or bounded_enums < 2:
        return False, ambiguous_parameters, "parameter-ambiguity"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "tool-schema-version"
    assert valid_schemas == tool_schemas and ambiguous_parameters == 0
    return True, valid_schemas, "typed-tool-catalog"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Tool Domain Types evidence · Theory Tool Domain Types
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-tool-domain-types-b0bsqm" that uses case 9734 to design narrow typed tool contracts with purpose, descriptions, domains, required fields, rejection, and version identity. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-tool-domain-types-b0bsqm
# Competency: agentpy-tool-domain-types.
# Case 9734: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_tool_domain_types_b0bsqm(tool_schemas: int = 8, valid_schemas: int = 8, ambiguous_parameters: int = 0, bounded_enums: int = 6, schema_versions: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_b0bsqm = "b0bsqm-mqsb0b-9734"
    assert evidence_variant_b0bsqm
    evidence_axes_b0bsqm = (
        "authorityb0bsqm",
        "interaction9734",
        "toolmqsb0b",
        "stateb0bsqm9734",
        "evaluation9734b0bsqm",
        "recoverymqsb0b9734",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_b0bsqm)) == 6
    if tool_schemas < 3 or valid_schemas < 0:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-count"
    if valid_schemas != tool_schemas:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-invalid"
    if ambiguous_parameters > 0 or bounded_enums < 2:
        return False, ambiguous_parameters, "parameter-ambiguity"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "tool-schema-version"
    assert valid_schemas == tool_schemas and ambiguous_parameters == 0
    return True, valid_schemas, "typed-tool-catalog"
